comment.body: Alma, brilliant weekly post — thank you! One quick question: could the BTC bubble burst further from your target macro levels? Given the scenario of highly leveraged companies like MSTR, which issue shares to buy Bitcoin and have a buying line in the sand around $70,000, isn’t there a risk of forced selling if prices drop further? That could lead to a sharper decline to where its a absorbed demand probably around 30k per btc
